title: Bcoordinates
description: mod that display coords in HUD
body:
A simply and easy way to display your coordidantes in the HUD

Depends [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

![image ingame mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7184fa79ee8251c627f9cfd95b52bfb0726cefa3.png)

You can press "L" key to show/hide coords (Key is configurable in Keybidings)

[Source](https://gitlab.com/Spectrasonic/bcoords)


Code with ❤️ by Spectrasonic
